state.coderResponse:
All validation gates and success criteria pass. Here's the consolidated result.

## Validation Gate Results

| Gate | Command | Result |
|------|---------|--------|
| L1 | `make build` | ✅ exit 0, produces `./bin/stagehand` |
| L2 | `./bin/stagehand --version` | ✅ `stagehand version a830674`, exit 0 |
| L3 | `test "$(./bin/stagehand --version)" != "...dev"` | ✅ PASS (not `dev`) |
| L4 | `go vet ./...` | ✅ clean |
| L5 | `test -z "$(gofmt -l .)"` | ✅ clean |
| L6 | `go test ./...` | ✅ exit 0 (module integrity) |
| L7 | `make -n test coverage vet fmt clean lint` | ✅ all resolve |

## Files Created
- `go.mod` / `go.sum` — module `github.com/dustin/stagehand`, `go 1.22`, cobra v1.10.2 + go-toml/v2 v2.4.2 (both indirect — expected without `tidy`, harmless)
- `cmd/stagehand/main.go` — cobra root stub: `var version="dev"` (ldflags target) + `Version: version` field; **no Run/RunE**, imports only `os` + cobra
- `Makefile` — 7 TAB-indented targets with version-injecting ldflags (`-X main.version=$(VERSION)`)
- `.gitignore` — `bin/`, `*.out`, `coverage.out`, `dist/`
- `.editorconfig` — optional, minimal

## Anti-Patterns Avoided
- ✅ Did NOT run `go mod tidy` (go-toml preserved)
- ✅ Used cobra's built-in `Version` field, NOT a manual `--version` flag
- ✅ No Run/RunE/staging logic (M7.T2 seam preserved)
- ✅ Makefile recipes use literal TABs
- ✅ No README/docs/internal/providers/.goreleaser created
- ✅ go directive pinned to 1.22 (not higher)

## Note
One behavioral nuance verified against the installed cobra source: bare `./bin/stagehand` prints only the `Short` description (cobra's `defaultHelpTemplate` guards `UsageString` behind `{{if or .Runnable .HasSubCommands}}`), and exits 0. This is **standard, unmodified cobra behavior** for a non-runnable command with no subcommands — it satisfies the contract gate "prints help, exit 0", and full usage appears once a `Run` is wired in M7.T2.

```json
{
   "result": "success",
   "message": "PRP P1_M1_T1_S1 fully implemented and all 7 validation gates pass. Created go.mod/go.sum (module github.com/dustin/stagehand, go 1.22, cobra v1.10.2 + go-toml/v2 v2.4.2), cmd/stagehand/main.go (cobra root stub with built-in Version field, NO Run, stdlib+cobra imports only), Makefile (7 TAB-indented targets with version-injecting ldflags), .gitignore (bin/, *.out, coverage.out, dist/), and optional .editorconfig. Verified: make build -> ./bin/stagehand; ./bin/stagehand --version -> 'stagehand version a830674' (git describe, NOT dev, proving ldflags injection) exit 0; bare invocation prints cobra help exit 0; go vet/go test/gofmt all clean; all Makefile targets resolve via make -n. No out-of-scope files (no README/docs/internal/providers/.goreleaser). Did NOT run go mod tidy (go-toml preserved as indirect, as required). golangci-lint not installed but its target text exists."
}
```
